ogTitle: Marys Mount vs Maryvale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marys Mount and Maryvale.
heading: Marys Mount vs Maryvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marys Mount, New South Wales and Maryvale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marys Mount has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Maryvale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marys Mount or Maryvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marys Mount has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Maryvale scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marys Mount scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Maryvale scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marys Mount or Maryvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marys Mount has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
